ECDSAInvalidSignatureLength(uint256).details: The signature has an invalid length.

ECDSAInvalidSignatureS(bytes32).details: The signature has an S value that is in the upper half order.

EIP712DomainChanged().details: MAY be emitted to signal that the domain could have changed.

INTEREST_DISCOUNT_BPS_PER_KARMA.details: Bps discount granted per 1 Karma, capped at the base rate.

KARMA_BORROW_RATE.details: ETH of borrow capacity granted per 1 Karma (18-decimal unit).

MIN_INTEREST_BPS.details: Floor on interest after Karma-based discount (basis points).

MIN_KARMA.details: Minimum Karma balance to borrow (18 decimals, matching real Karma ERC20).

permitUsed.details: Marks a specific permit digest as consumed.

cancelLoan(uint256).notice: Cancel an Open loan and refund any contributors. Only the         stealth borrower may call (the Karma holder never appears).

domainSeparator().notice: Exposes the EIP-712 domain separator so off-chain signers can verify.

fundLoan(uint256).notice: Top up an open loan. When the target is reached the bucket is         sent to the stealth borrower in a single transfer. Overpayment         is refunded to the caller in-call.

getAdjustedInterestBps(uint256,uint256).notice: Interest in basis points after Karma-based discount.

getMaxBorrow(uint256).notice: How much ETH a given Karma balance can borrow in a single bucket.

hashBorrowPermit(address,uint256,uint256.notice: Computes the EIP-712 digest the Karma holder should sign.

markDefault(uint256).notice: Anyone can flag an overdue funded loan as defaulted. State change only —         we cannot slash Karma (the real Karma token is read-only from external         contracts) and storing the Karma holder's address would break privacy.

repayLoan(uint256).notice: Repay principal + interest. Only the stealth borrower may call.

requestLoanWithPermit(address,uint256,ui.notice: Open a new loan against a stealth address, authorized by the         off-chain signature of a Karma holder. Must be called by the         stealth address itself — never by the Karma holder.

userdoc.notice: Privacy-first, Karma-gated, stealth-operated lending. Privacy model:   - Every on-chain action (requestLoan, fundLoan, repayLoan, cancelLoan,     markDefault) is authored by a stealth address. The primary identity     holding Karma never sends an on-chain transaction to this contract.   - To gate borrowing by Karma without linking the primary identity, the     Karma holder signs an off-chain EIP-712 `BorrowPermit` authorizing a     specific stealth to open a specific bucket. The stealth submits that     permit. The contract `ecrecover`s the signer, reads their Karma, and     verifies — but never stores or emits the signer's address.   - Replay is prevented by marking each permit digest as used. The digest     is a hash and does not reveal the signer.   - No Karma awards / no Karma slashing: the real Karma token on Status is     read-only from external contracts, and any on-chain identity tracking     would break the privacy guarantee. What's still observable:   - The Karma-holder signature sits in the request transaction's calldata.     A determined observer can `ecrecover` it to recover the signer. Making     that link strongly private requires a ZK proof ("I know an address with     Karma ≥ N") and is out of scope here. Using a fresh `salt` per permit     prevents correlation across a single signer's loans.
